llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Make a motion to approve the consent items. I'll second. All those in favor.

items.intro_words: Okay, we can go ahead and get started. Evelyn, can we have a roll call, please?
Evelyn, can we have a roll call, please? Trustee Marquez.
All right, welcome, everybody, to the final board meeting of the 2324 school year.
All right, welcome, everybody, to the final board meeting of the 2324 school year.
So do we have any changes to the agenda?
So do we have any changes to the agenda?
I'll move to approve the agenda. Thank you. Seconded. All those in favor?
I'll move to approve the agenda. Thank you. Seconded. All those in favor?
We do not have any oral communication. I believe no speakers cards.
We do not have any oral communication. I believe no speakers cards.
That brings us to bond consent items. Do we have a motion to approve?
I will make a motion to approve. Second. All those in favor?
Wonderful. Thank you, guys. Have a great summer.
Wonderful. Thank you, guys. Have a great summer.
We have no action items. So discussion item.
Discussion on local indicator measurements for the California dashboard.
Discussion on local indicator measurements for the California dashboard.
So moving on to consent. Consent items. Do we have a motion.
Make a motion to approve the consent items. I'll second. All those in favor.
